meta.headerTldr: Senior iOS — shared SDKs, marketplace & loyalty platform, voice AI on watchOS. Kyiv · open to remote.
meta.summary: Senior iOS Engineer with 10+ years building production mobile applications across marketplaces, loyalty, subscriptions, and real-time products. Recently delivered an Apple Watch voice AI prototype with real-time backend communication, intent-driven navigation, and hands-free workflows (R&D, NDA). Built and maintained a shared marketplace/loyalty SDK across 3 production host applications, enabling parallel delivery for 7–10 iOS engineers; owned Premium Subscription end-to-end with 99–100% crash-free staged releases.
meta.summaryShort: Recently delivered an Apple Watch voice AI prototype (R&D, NDA). Senior iOS engineer, 10+ years — marketplaces, shared SDK ecosystems, loyalty, subscriptions. Shared marketplace/loyalty SDK in 3 apps (7–10 engineers); Premium Subscription end-to-end; 99–100% crash-free staged releases.
meta.syncRule: Edit this file first, then update cv.html (displayFull for timeline roles), index-short.html (senior timeline roles only), experience.html (displayShort for timeline roles). Alchemy lives in Other projects only — not in roles[].
